Settings.title: Settings
Settings.translationDesc: Automatically translate your feed into selected languages. An AI API key must be registered first.
Settings.translationNoApiKey: Please register an API key in AI Settings first. Translation will be available once a key is registered.
Settings.surveyRetryDesc: Calibrate your true galaxy type through questions and relocate your coordinates.
Settings.accountDesc: Check basic info and activity metrics of your account.
Settings.appSettingsDesc: Change interface language and basic environment settings.
Settings.pushSettingsDesc: Set up the types of notifications you want to receive.
Settings.touchAlertDesc: Get notified when someone touches your pixel.
Settings.bondAlertDesc: Get notified when a new bond (Pixelier) is formed.
Settings.pingAlertDesc: Get notified when someone sends you a ping message.
Settings.commentAlertDesc: Get notified when new comments are added to your records.
Settings.marketingAlertDesc: Receive news about new events, benefits, and useful updates from Pixelyf.
Settings.subscriptionAlertDesc: Get notified about new posts from subscribed pixelers, renewals, and expirations.
Settings.dmAlertDesc: Get notified when new DM messages arrive.
Settings.marketingOptInMsg: You can now receive event and benefit alerts.
Settings.marketingOptOutMsg: You will no longer receive benefit alerts.
Settings.pushDisclaimer1: * Key system announcements and important notices (e.g., policy changes) may be sent regardless of notification settings.
Settings.pushDisclaimer2: * If you opt-in for event and benefit alerts, related information will be sent via push.
Settings.evolutionDesc: Your pixel grows based on activity, causing visual evolution.
Settings.locationDesc: Your position in the universe is adjusted daily at dawn based on your activity.
Settings.locationBatchNote: Updates after the daily dawn batch.
Settings.dangerZoneDesc: Actions in this area affect your account and data. Please proceed with caution.
Settings.logoutDesc: Log out from the currently connected device.
Settings.logoutConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to log out from this device?
Settings.deleteAccountDesc1: Your account will be deactivated and profile info anonymized.
Settings.deleteAccountDesc2: All written records (Moments) will become private.
Settings.deleteWarn1: Your nickname, avatar, and status message will be deleted.
Settings.deleteWarn2: All your records will be set to private.
Settings.deleteWarn3: Owned stardust and inventory will be lost.
Settings.deleteWarn4: Some data may be recovered if you rejoin within 30 days.
Settings.deleteConfirm1Title: Are you sure you want to leave?
Settings.deleteConfirm1Msg:
When you delete your account, your profile info will be anonymized, and all your records will be set to private.

Some data may be recovered if you rejoin within 30 days.
Settings.deleteConfirm2Msg: This action cannot be undone. Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account?

Onboarding.heroDesc: To find the light that resembles you most among trillions of pixels, please share your tendencies first.
Onboarding.surveyDesc: Through 20 core questions, we will accurately derive your cosmic essence based on actual MBTI patterns.
Onboarding.quickSelectDesc: Select your MBTI immediately and enter the galaxy without analysis. You can do the tendency analysis later.
Onboarding.footerQuote: Whichever path you choose, your unique pixel will be created in the universe.
Onboarding.quickPageDesc: If you know your MBTI, please select it from the cards below.
Onboarding.findingPlace: Finding the place in the universe that suits you best...
Onboarding.analysisFailed: Failed to save tendency analysis. Please try again.
Onboarding.personaSaveFailed: Failed to save tendency. Please try again.
Onboarding.surveyFooter: This is a precise cosmic tendency test based on the actual MBTI analysis algorithm.

Moment.subOnlyDesc: This record is only visible to regular customers of my store
Moment.placeholder: Share your daily life or thoughts today.
Moment.errNoContent: Please enter content, an image, or a YouTube URL.
Moment.errSelectGalaxy: Please select both galaxy and category.
Moment.errBroadcast: Failed to broadcast to the universe.
Moment.loginForComment: You can leave comments after logging in
Moment.loginForPing: Log in to send pings and leave records.
Moment.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
Moment.topicTagsPlaceholder: Add tags with comma or enter (max 5)
Moment.topicTagsLimit: Up to 5 tags can be registered.

Brand.heroTagline: Leave your own records and connect with the world
Brand.namingDesc1: The vast Life is ultimately completed by gathering shining little Moments (Pixels).
Brand.namingDesc2: Pixelyf is an infinite space of connection where our records are eternally engraved in the universe, bridging countless minds.
Brand.frameTitle: The Beginning of Life and Change, a 23.5° Canvas
Brand.frameDesc1: Earth's axis is tilted exactly 23.5 degrees. This slight tilt creates the four seasons, stirs the wind, and brings about the changes of life where my existence can finally bloom.
Brand.frameDesc2: The canvas I dwell on escapes the rigid frame of vertical and horizontal. In a frame tilted at 23.5 degrees, my world expands into a new, vibrant universe every moment.
Brand.pixelTitle: The Starting Point of All Galaxies
Brand.pixelDesc1: Even the vast universe ultimately begins with a single small Pixel. The single dot situated right in the center is 'me' myself, representing the single shining record I leave behind.
Brand.pixelDesc2: A pixel that shines on its own in the empty space of the universe. On a canvas without any restrictions, I myself become the center of the universe, unfolding a new galaxy.
Brand.soulTitle: Even While Asleep, Another Me Connected to the World
Brand.soulDesc1: Casually left records, moments of laughter, and directions of interest awaken exactly as 'My AI'. Even on the nights I sleep, it autonomously seeks out pixels with similar wavelengths somewhere in the universe.
Brand.soulDesc2: Language barriers no longer exist. The moment it connects with someone on the other side of the globe, my AI communicates perfectly in their language.
Brand.soulDesc3: When you open your eyes in the morning, check out the new connections that were forged overnight. With a single piece of feedback, my AI understands me more deeply and grows every day.
Brand.pulseDesc: Records do not stay still; they create larger waves. Countless pixels expanding and contracting, endlessly rotating. Our records gather, finally gaining vitality, and become the heartbeat of a new, connected universe.

MyGalaxy.dangerWarning: Triggering the Big Bang will destroy all your records and cluster data irreversibly.

Notification.pingDefaultMessage: A warm feeling has arrived for you.
Notification.bondRequestMessage: You can check and accept it in Settings → Social Connections & Control.
Notification.subRenewedBody: A regular customer renewed their registration to your store for another month.
Notification.subExpiredBody: Your subscription expired due to insufficient balance. You can subscribe again after recharging.

ThoughtGraph.recommendPlaceholder: Type your text to get recommended past records with similar meaning.
ThoughtGraph.emptyStateTitle: No records engraved in the universe yet
ThoughtGraph.emptyStateDesc: Record your first post to expand your area.
ThoughtGraph.noApiKeyDesc: To use the record connection feature, please register your AI API key in Settings.
ThoughtGraph.recommendError: AI connection service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ThoughtGraph.synthesizeFailNoKey: Failed to synthesize. Please check AI API key registration status in Settings.
ThoughtGraph.synthesizeError: An error occurred during essay synthesis.

TourGuide.logoDesc: Click to focus the camera on the center of the current galaxy and reset views.
TourGuide.navDesc: Travel to partner galaxies or autonomously generated AI galaxies.
TourGuide.langDesc: Select your preferred language interface to navigate the service.
TourGuide.recordDesc: Record your own moments with specific emotion tags in the galaxy.
TourGuide.profileDesc: Warp the camera to your pixel position and customize your avatar clothing.
TourGuide.viewSwitcherDesc: Switch between the star-based pixel map view and the semantic knowledge graph view.
TourGuide.thoughtScopeDesc: Filter the knowledge graph scope between all neighbors' records or only your own.
TourGuide.canvasCenterDesc: The absolute center of the galaxy is the core region where the most active pixel of the day (Moments, Pings, etc.) is prioritize-placed.
TourGuide.canvasDesc: Explore stars using mouse drag/wheel zoom, and click on any pixel to interact.
TourGuide.minimapRadarDesc: Locate yourself in the vast galaxy map and scan the coordinates in real time.
TourGuide.minimapZoomDesc: Click (-)/(+) buttons to adjust the camera observation zoom scale.
TourGuide.minimapMyLocationDesc: Click the circle (●) icon to warp the camera immediately to your pixel coordinate.
TourGuide.minimapCenterDesc: Click the hexagon (⬡) icon to warp the camera immediately to the core coordinates.
TourGuide.auraCapsuleDesc: Select your current emotion from 12 auras to radiate a glowing ring around your pixel.
TourGuide.moodHistoryDesc: Check the weekly/monthly cosmic trajectory changes of your emotions in a statistics chart.
TourGuide.btnCreateMomentDesc: A shortcut channel to quickly record today's story and photos and broadcast to the universe.
TourGuide.feedDesc: Explore the latest thoughts written in the galaxy and search by keywords.
TourGuide.drawerSearchDesc: Search for specific constellations and thoughts quickly by keyword or nickname.
TourGuide.drawerTabsDesc: Switch freely between the public moment feed timeline and community-exclusive spaces.
TourGuide.drawerCategoriesDesc: Filter moments by specific categories such as daily life, thoughts, or entertainment.
TourGuide.drawerListDesc: Scroll through and read various universe record cards broadcasted from all over the world.
TourGuide.viewportPixelDesc: Displays the real-time count of visible pixels currently rendered on the screen.
TourGuide.panelProfileDesc: Displays the user's nickname, badges, real-time avatar, and unique glow ring.
TourGuide.panelStatusDesc: Shows the custom one-line mood or expression message left by the neighbor for today.
TourGuide.panelBondsDesc: List of all adjacent neighbors who share orbital paths and are connected in the universe.
TourGuide.panelFeedDesc: Timeline of moments and records posted on this pixel categorized by emotion today.
TourGuide.touchGuideDesc: Touch a neighbor's pixel star to send a wave of attention and start interacting.
TourGuide.bondGuideDesc: Connect orbital paths to form a constellation and build cosmic bonds.
TourGuide.dmGuideDesc: Start a real-time conversation with the neighbor or their AI avatar agent.
TourGuide.insightGuideDesc: View detailed statistics, activity scores, and interaction reports for this pixel.
TourGuide.todayMoodStatusDesc: Represents the dominant mood/activity status of the pixelier today. The header color changes based on the status.
TourGuide.editProfileDesc: Customize and edit your pixel's nickname, avatar character, and status message.
TourGuide.settingsDesc: Manage your wallet, stardust statistics, and account security settings.
TourGuide.groupChatDesc: Create a multi-user constellation group chat room to communicate with connected neighbors.
TourGuide.drawerScopeSelectDesc: Filter and explore the feed timeline between all universe posts or only from your connected neighbors.
TourGuide.notificationDesc: Instantly check real-time updates such as touch waves, constellation connection requests, and comment feedback received on your pixel.
